steps.title: Locate the “costs” bar in the legend and graph
steps.content: The legend at the bottom shows three factors: convenience (dark gray), costs (light gray), and established behaviors (black). The question asks specifically about “costs,” so find the light gray bar in the graph.

steps.title: Read the height of the costs bar against the y-axis
steps.content: The light gray bar representing costs reaches to the 50% gridline on the vertical axis. The other choices (10%, 25%, and 95%) do not match any bar's height. That matches choice D — D is correct.
